positive: A highly detailed, central symmetrical illustration featuring a constellation pattern weaving through stylized geometric flora and celestial bodies. The main subject is an ornate, glowing mythical creature, perhaps a lunar-wing griffin or a stylized serpent, rendered in clean, bold silhouette lines. The color palette is limited to deep midnight blues, vibrant iridescent teal, gold leaf accents, and stark white contrast. The style should be high-contrast, tattoo-inspired neo-traditional linework meets ethereal watercolor washes, ensuring the print remains clean and legible when scaled. Composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical, suitable for a circular or square patch print. Dramatic, soft volumetric lighting emanating from the central creature, giving a glow effect against a deep, cosmic void.
negative: blurry, poor anatomy, text, watermark, signature, low detail, artifacts, noise, extra limbs, ugly, disfigured, cartoon, comic book, realism, excessive gradients, amateur sketch
